name: Rugala
recipeInstructions:
1. For the filling, combine pecans, currants, sugar, and cinnamon in a mixing bowl.
2. For the dough, combine cream cheese, flour, butter, and sugar in a processor or mixer and blend well. Divide the dough into four pieces. Dust each piece with flour, shaking off excess. Roll each piece between sheets of waxed paper into 10-inch circles. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease baking sheets.
4. Spread each circle of dough with apricot jam. Divide the filling among the circles, spreading evenly.
5. Cut each into 12 wedges. Roll up each wedge from bottom to point.
6. Arrange on prepared sheets, point side down. Bake until golden, about 16-17 minutes.
7. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool. Store cookies in an airtight container.
Tips:
- Be sure to work with just one circle at a time and keep others refrigerated.
- Don't overdo the jam and cinnamon/pecan filling as they tend to overflow and will burn quickly on your baking sheets.
- Remove from the baking sheet to cool on racks when they turn golden brown on top. After rolling out between waxed paper, let cool for about 1 hour before cutting out. They may be made ahead and refrigerated longer, just leave them out a bit before cutting to ensure the dough isn't too stiff to handle properly.
